positive: A mystical, geometric celestial forest scene. Intricate, interwoven branches and leaves form crystalline structures, glowing with ethereal bioluminescence. The composition is highly centralized, featuring a majestic, stylized moon surrounded by clusters of glowing, geometric flora. Use a dark navy and deep violet color palette contrasted sharply with neon teal, electric aqua, and glowing gold accents. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau symmetry and low-poly geometric precision. Clean silhouettes, high contrast, centered design optimized for apparel printing, detailed line work, symmetrical arrangement, studio lighting setup.
